Text: The authors of the communications, received between 2019 and 2021, are nationals of Belarus. They claim that Belarus has violated their rights under articles 2 (1), (2) and (3), 7, 9 (1), 19 (2), 21, and 26 (communication No. 3879/2021); articles 2, 9 and 19 (communication No. 3930/2021); and articles 2 (2), (3), 19 and 21 (communication No. 3960/2021) of the Covenant. The authors are not represented by counsel.

The State party submitted observations on the admissibility and merits in all communications in 2021 and 2023. After the request for authors’ comments on the State party’s observations remained unanswered, reminders to submit comments were sent to all authors between 2022 and 2024. The authors were informed that their communications could be discontinued in the absence of a response.
In view of the fact that no response was received and that contact was lost with the authors, the Committee decided at its 144th session on 17 July 2025 to discontinue the communications.
